title: elaphoglossum costaricense
intro: Elaphoglossum costaricense is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic fern. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Costa Rica, where it is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Elaphoglossum costaricense include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight against infections, and even lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
